exam_name: CIPS Level 5 Advanced Diploma in Procurement and Supply

testing_centers.notes: CIPS computer-based assessments are delivered at Pearson VUE test centres globally and via online remote proctoring. Exams are offered year-round with multiple sittings. Corporate Award assessments are delivered through the organisation's bespoke programme arrangement.

id_requirements: Valid government-issued photo ID required. CIPS membership number required for exam booking. Name must match CIPS registration.
exam_rules: Computer-based assessment, 90 minutes, closed-book. Multiple choice and objective questions. No notes, personal materials, or internet access permitted. CIPS Code of Conduct applies; misconduct may result in disqualification.
renewal_options: CIPS membership requires annual renewal. MCIPS and FCIPS members must demonstrate ongoing CPD each year to maintain their designation. CIPS requires a minimum of 30 CPD hours per year for practising members.

prerequisites.description: CIPS Level 4 Diploma or equivalent professional experience. Graduate entry may allow direct entry at Level 5.

retake_policy.notes: Candidates who fail may re-sit at the next available sitting. Full exam fee required for each resit attempt. No limit on the number of attempts.

domains.name: Category Management in Procurement and Supply
Improving the Competitiveness of Supply Chains
Managing Contracts and Relationships in Procurement and Supply

official_study_resources.title: CIPS Study Materials and Practice Exams
official_study_resources.notes: Official CIPS study guides, e-learning modules, and practice assessments available through the CIPS online learning platform (My CIPS).

aliases: cips level 5 advanced diploma in procurement and supply
